LVMH reported total revenue of €19.1 billion for the first quarter of 2026, representing a 6% decline on a reported basis from €20.3 billion in the prior-year period. However, the company emphasized that organic growth remained positive at 1%, with the significant gap between organic and reported performance attributable to a severe 7% negative currency impact. The **Wines & Spirits** business group recorded organic revenue growth of 5% in the first quarter of 2026. The **Fashion & Leather Goods** business group was down 2% on an organic basis in the first quarter of 2026, impacted by the conflict in the Middle East.
